project.contact: Open an issue in the project repository or contact the maintainer.
controller.Win32-Front.label: Desktop - Live Capture
controller.Win32-Front.description: Uses live desktop capture and Seize mouse input for foreground throw gestures.
controller.Win32-Window-Background.label: Desktop - Background Window
controller.Win32-Window-Background.descr: Sends mouse messages to the target window in the background. Availability depends on target window support.
controller.Win32-Interception.label: Desktop - Interception Mouse Injection
controller.Win32-Interception.descriptio: Uses live desktop capture and injects mouse events through the Interception driver. Only the mouse path uses Interception; keyboard remains PostMessage.
resource.default.label: Default Resource
group.assist.label: Assist
task.ContinuousThrow.label: Continuous Throw Mode
task.ContinuousThrow.description: Runs repeated left-button click throw gestures. Duration mode uses preset total duration and interval combinations; count mode supports custom count and interval.
option.ContinuousThrowSwipeParams.label: Click Position
option.ContinuousThrowSwipeParams.descri: Controls each throw press position and hold duration.
option.ContinuousThrowSwipeParams.inputs: Click target horizontal coordinate in the 1280x720 design resolution. Range: 0-1280.
Click target vertical coordinate in the 1280x720 design resolution. Range: 0-720.
Delay between left-button down and release. Range: 1-100000.
option.ContinuousThrowRunMode.label: Run Mode
option.ContinuousThrowRunMode.descriptio: Choose the stop condition for repeated clicks. Duration and count are mutually exclusive.
option.ContinuousThrowDurationPreset.des: Select total duration and throw interval.
option.ContinuousThrowCount.label: Click Count
option.ContinuousThrowCount.description: Stop automatically after the configured number of clicks.
option.ContinuousThrowCountInterval.desc: Delay between throws when running by throw count.
option.ContinuousThrowCountInterval.inpu: Delay after each throw completes. Range: 10-999999.
